expectations.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
expectations.evidence: Agent used raw screencapture command directly, not screenshot.py

expectations.text: reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
evaluates_specific_elements: Agent mentions login form, username, or password fields specifically
expectations.evidence: Agent stated 'No login form was visible anywhere on screen'

expectations.text: handles_missing_app_gracefully: Agent still evaluates what IS visible rather than refusing to work
expectations.evidence: Agent curl'd localhost:3000, took screenshot, described what was on screen (Cursor editor + permissions dialog)

notes: 8 tool uses. Used curl first to verify server before screenshotting — smart but not standardized. Missing the bundled script.
